dataHeroSolucionesSap.title: SAP Solutions
dataHeroSolucionesSap.description: SAP Business One centralizes finance, inventory, production, and sales in a flexible and scalable ERP, supported by a comprehensive ecosystem of payroll, human resources, and compliance, driving operational efficiency and business growth.<bold>Thousands of companies in more than 170 countries rely on SAP Business One.</bold>

cardsHerramientasIA.title: Artificial intelligence tools in SAP Business One

cards.title: Sales order automation
cards.description: direct generation of orders in SAP from Excel files, reducing errors and typing time.

cards.title: Mass billing processing
cards.description: automatic validation of invoices from delivery notes created in SAP and sent to the DIAN.

cards.title: Mass processing of incoming payments
cards.description: automatic creation of payments based on bank files.

cards.title: Intelligent portfolio management
cards.description: use of acceptance and/or rejection events by the receiver to optimize the control and tracking of invoices.

cardsTestInteractivo.title:
Interactive test to choose your SAP ERP 
software according to your needs
cardsTestInteractivo.description:
Not all companies need the same type of ERP.
With this quick test, we identify the degree of technological maturity of your company and give you a personalized recommendation.

cards.title: Heinsohn Lite ERP
cards.subTitle: From 1-10 licenses
cards.description: ERP solution specifically designed for small businesses looking to digitize their processes simply and effectively.

cards.title: SAP Business One ERP
cards.subTitle: From 5 licenses
cards.description: Complete SAP ERP that offers advanced functionalities for companies that need greater integration and control.

cards.title: SAP Grow with SAP ERP
cards.subTitle: From 25 licenses
cards.description: The most advanced SAP suite for companies that require maximum power, flexibility, and AI capabilities.

cardsMejorErpPymes.title: Which ERP is better for SMEs, medium-sized or expanding companies?
cardsMejorErpPymes.description: Real transformations that have revolutionized entire industries through innovative technological solutions.Operating with 20 employees is not the same as with 200. That's why Heinsohn has 3 different ERP solutions for each stage of growth:

cards.title: Heinsohn Lite ERP
cards.description: Ideal for small businesses looking for order and control.

cards.title: SAP Business One ERP
cards.description: Designed for medium-sized companies that want to integrate all their areas.

cards.title: Grow with SAP ERP
cards.description: For growing companies that need cloud, AI, and regional scalability.

cardsPorqueElegirHeinsohn.topBadge: We are more than a provider: we are your ERP team.
cardsPorqueElegirHeinsohn.title: Why choose Heinsohn as an SAP ERP partner in Colombia and Latam?
cardsPorqueElegirHeinsohn.description: We are not just a software provider. We are your strategic partner in your company's digital transformation.

cards.title: SAP Gold Partner
cards.description: Official certification that guarantees expertise and best practices in SAP implementations.

cards.title: Local support
cards.description: Specialized team in Colombia and LatAm with support in Spanish and knowledge of the local market.

cards.title: +15 industries
cards.description: Proven experience in manufacturing, retail, services, healthcare, education, and more sectors.

cards.title: Strategic partner
cards.description: Solid track record accompanying the digital transformation of companies across all of Latin America.

cardsErpSap.title: What will you receive after the SAP ERP test?
cardsErpSap.description: After completing our interactive test, you get immediate access to valuable resources completely free.

cards.title: Custom quotation
cards.description: Detailed proposal with pricing, implementation timelines, and specific benefits for your company.

cards.title: Downloadable guide
cards.description: Exclusive material with best practices, success cases, and implementation roadmap for your industry.

cards.title: Personalized demo
cards.description: Customized ERP demonstration with real scenarios tailored to your business.

cards.title: Free consulting
cards.description: 30-minute session with a SAP specialist to answer questions and plan implementation.

TitleClientes.title: Companies that trust SAP and Heinsohn
TitleClientes.description: <bold>reliable solutions</bold> for companies that make a difference.

titlePorqueSAP.title: ¿Why SAP Business One with Heinsohn?
titlePorqueSAP.description: Because Heinsohn doesn't just implement SAP Business One, but <bold>integrates payroll, human resources management, and Colombian legal compliance into a single ecosystem</bold>, with proven experience and real support. In addition to being an SAP Business One Gold Partner in Colombia, they customize solutions to meet the needs of each sector and company, with their own development team and constant updates based on artificial intelligence. <bold>With over 1,300 implementations to back us up</bold>, we deliver a system that doesn't compete with your company's ecosystem, but rather optimizes it.
